qaRounds.summary: Factual/source QA found and fixed unsupported past-midnight bar claim; build/typecheck passed; screenshots blocked by unavailable browser.

Mobile/conversion QA found homepage conversion depth was split across sub-routes; added homepage text-menu and contact/CTA sections; build/typecheck passed; screenshots blocked by unavailable browser.
Final sell-readiness QA found demo/market-range menu prices were unsafe; hid prices until owner-confirmed; build/typecheck passed; screenshots still pending browser unblock.

blockers.reason: Fresh QA screenshots cannot be captured because the OpenClaw managed browser cannot start on this host (No supported browser found). Source/build QA advanced; next unblock action is enabling browser/Chromium capture for desktop + mobile screenshots.

Fresh Round 2 desktop/mobile screenshots cannot be captured because browser.doctor reports no managed Chromium executable and user-profile attach is not connected. Code/build QA advanced; next unblock action is enabling Chrome/Chromium capture.

Fresh Round 3 desktop/mobile screenshots cannot be captured because no managed Chromium executable is available and user browser attach is not connected. Final visual QA remains pending browser access.
Owner-confirmed menu prices are still pending; demo/market-range prices were removed from the preview to avoid invented pricing claims.
